subject: A pack of wolves descending through a dim forest, following a glowing trail of paw-prints across the forest floor
description: Two or more dark-furred wolves push through a shadowy woodland clearing, jaws open and teeth bared as they crest over mossy stones and roots. The lead wolf is mid-stride, eyes locked on prey out of frame to the right. In the foreground a chain of luminous yellow paw-prints glows on the leaf-strewn ground, marking a magical scent-trail the pack is following. The forest behind is dense with vertical trunks and tangled undergrowth in muted greens and browns; the only bright element is the supernatural yellow of the tracking spell.
foreground: glowing yellow paw-print trail across leaf-littered forest floor; lead wolf snarling forward
background: dense dim forest with vertical tree trunks, mossy stones, tangled undergrowth
emotion: predatory focus, snarling aggression, the thrill of the hunt
